title: Softer Pastels
description: A mod that adds a lot of Pastel-colored blocks, maybe for a softer vibe.
body:
# Softer Pastels

A mod that brings a lot of Pastel-colored blocks, maybe for a softer vibe. 

These blocks and items originally were a part of a much bigger project that has ceased development, formerly known as [Pastel Wonderland](https://github.com/devOS-Sanity-Edition/pastelwonderland). It now lives as it's own separate mod.

We recommend you use this mod along with [Architecture Extensions](https://modrinth.com/mod/arch-ex) and [Wood You Dye](https://modrinth.com/mod/wyd/versions)!

![All the blocks](https://github.com/devOS-Sanity-Edition/SofterPastels/assets/99072163/d1dfee44-2d4a-46d7-b1f5-8c34f108722f)
#### *All images shown here and in the Gallery tab use Softer Pastels, alongside Architecture Extensions, since Softer Pastels has integration with Architecture Extensions

Most block recipes are in the Gallery tab.
